rewards_reviews_editor.title: Rewards & Reviews Editor
rewards_reviews_editor.visibility_note: If hidden, the transaction won't show in any employee's transaction history, but the bucks will still be added/deducted from their total. Managers will still be able to see all transactions.
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_warning: Warning: Resetting bucks will set the balance to $0 and delete all transaction history. This action cannot be undone.
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_all_warning: This will reset ALL employees' {{currencyName}} to $0 and delete ALL transaction history for everyone.
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_user_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset {{name}}'s {{currencyName}} to $0? This will also delete all their transaction history. This action cannot be undone.
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset ALL employees' {{currencyName}} to $0? This will also delete ALL transaction history for everyone. This action cannot be undone.
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_success: {{name}}'s {{currencyName}} have been reset to $0 and all transactions deleted
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_all_success: All employees' {{currencyName}} have been reset to $0 and all transactions deleted
rewards_reviews_editor.reset_all_error: Failed to reset all users bucks
rewards_reviews_editor.transaction_updated: Transaction updated successfully and user balance recalculated
rewards_reviews_editor.delete_transaction_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This will remove it from the history but will NOT affect {{name}}'s total balance.
rewards_reviews_editor.hide_transaction_confirm_show: Are you sure you want to show this transaction? This will show it to all employees in their recent transaction list but will NOT affect their total balance. Managers will still be able to see all transactions.
rewards_reviews_editor.hide_transaction_confirm_hide: Are you sure you want to hide this transaction? This will hide it from all employees in their recent transaction list but will NOT affect their total balance. Managers will still be able to see all transactions.
rewards_reviews_editor.delete_review_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this review?
rewards_reviews_editor.refresh_queued_message: Your Google reviews are importing — they'll appear here shortly.
rewards_reviews_editor.premium_feature_msg: Automatic Google Reviews import requires the Premium plan ($15/mo).

rewards_reviews_editor.refresh_limit_message: You've used all your manual refreshes for this subscription period. Reviews still refresh automatically every Monday & Thursday.
rewards_reviews_editor.hide_review_confirm: Hide this Google review from employees?
rewards_reviews_editor.show_review_confirm: Show this Google review to employees?

word_search.intro_desc: Discover ingredient words hidden in the letter grid. Learn what's in every dish while you search!
word_search.cat_dishes_ingredients_desc: Words from every dish across the whole menu
word_search.cat_libations_ingredients_desc: Words from libation recipes and Cocktails A-Z
word_search.play_mode_free_desc: No time limit — learn at your own pace
word_search.play_mode_timed_desc: Race the clock for bonus points!
word_search.great_work: Great work finding all the ingredients!
word_search.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all Word Search scores for {{category}}?
word_search.editor_info: Word Search puzzles are automatically generated from the menu database. Puzzles update automatically when menu items change.
word_search.intro_tip: 💡 Each ingredient shows its full name, but you only need to find the key word in the grid (e.g. "Shiitake" for Shiitake Mushrooms).
word_search.be_first_to: Be the first to complete a {{category}} puzzle.

picture_this.intro_desc: Spot the correct ingredients, prices, and more from menu pictures. Choose a category, pick your difficulty, and play with Lives or Beat the Clock!
picture_this.intro_tip: 💡 Wrong answers cost a life (or seconds), so read each option carefully — you can't move on until you pick correctly.
picture_this.cat_food_desc: Identify ingredients in dishes from across the menu
picture_this.cat_libations_desc: Cocktails, martinis, sangria, and ABV drinks
picture_this.cat_wine_desc: Match wines to their location and price
picture_this.cat_menu_prices_desc: Match prices across the entire menu
picture_this.diff_hard_desc: Pick the full ingredient list • 5 lives
picture_this.diff_expert_desc: Match prices across the menu • 4 lives • most points
picture_this.mode_lives_desc: Wrong answers cost a life. Bonuses every 5 questions!
picture_this.mode_timed_desc: 2 minutes — answer as many as you can correctly!
picture_this.not_enough_items: Not enough menu items in this category to play. Try a different category.
picture_this.load_failed: Could not load menu items. Check your connection.
picture_this.prompt_ingredient_easy: Which of these is an ingredient in the {{item}}?
picture_this.prompt_ingredient_medium: Which two ingredients are in the {{item}}?
picture_this.prompt_ingredient_hard: Which is the correct ingredient list for the {{item}}?
picture_this.prompt_wine_medium: Which name and location matches this wine?
picture_this.prompt_price_glass: What is the glass price for {{item}}?
picture_this.prompt_price_bottle: What is the bottle price for {{item}}?
picture_this.prompt_price_member: What is the member bottle price for {{item}}?

ws_editor.title: Word Search Editor
ws_editor.info: Word Search puzzles are automatically generated from the menu database. No manual content needed — puzzles update automatically when menu items change.
ws_editor.scoreboard_desc: Reset leaderboards for individual categories or clear all scores at once.
ws_editor.confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset all Word Search scores for {{label}}? This cannot be undone.
ws_editor.success_msg: Word Search scores for {{label}} have been reset.
ws_editor.error_msg: Failed to reset scores. Please try again.

pt_editor.title: Picture This! Editor
pt_editor.info: Picture This! questions are automatically generated from the menu database. Each category pulls from menu items with photos. Adjust difficulty in-game.
pt_editor.scoreboard_desc: Reset leaderboards for individual categories or clear all scores at once.
pt_editor.confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset {{label}} scores? This cannot be undone.
pt_editor.success_msg: Picture This! scores for {{label}} have been reset.
pt_editor.error_msg: Failed to reset scores. Please try again.
pt_editor.tip: 💡 Tip: For per-employee score management, head to the Game Hub Editor.

game_hub_editor.title: Game Hub Editor
game_hub_editor.subtitle: Manage game content and leaderboards for all staff games.
game_hub_editor.lookup_desc: Search for an employee to view and reset their individual game scores.
game_hub_editor.sample_data_desc: When toggled on the games will use a built in MyResto Sample Menu so new staff can play right away! Turn off to use only your menu items once they are added.
game_hub_editor.sample_data_error: Couldn't update the setting. Please try again.
game_hub_editor.danger_desc: Reset all scores across all games for every player.
game_hub_editor.memory_editor_desc: Manage wine pairings, game content, and reset leaderboards
game_hub_editor.ws_editor_desc: Reset word search leaderboards by category or all at once
game_hub_editor.pt_editor_desc: Reset Picture This! leaderboards by category or all at once
game_hub_editor.test_modal_msg_mark: Test users are excluded from all game leaderboards. Their scores still save but won't appear in any leaderboard tab. Use this for QA testing without polluting real-staff rankings.
game_hub_editor.test_modal_msg_unmark: This user will appear in all game leaderboards again going forward.
game_hub_editor.reset_all_modal_msg: This will delete every score from every game across every player. Memory, Word Search, Picture This! — all gone. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
game_hub_editor.all_reset_msg: All game scores have been reset.

game_hub_ui.title: Game Hub
game_hub_ui.subtitle: Test your knowledge of the menu with fun, interactive games.
game_hub_ui.no_scores: No scores yet — be the first!

master_leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
master_leaderboard.subtitle_overall: Total points from all games combined
master_leaderboard.subtitle_memory: Total points from Menu Memory Game
master_leaderboard.subtitle_word: Total points from Word Search puzzles

rewards_ui.redeem_section_desc: Pick your section for a chosen shift.
rewards_ui.redeem_sidework_desc: Pick your side work for a chosen shift.
rewards_ui.redeem_freeshift_desc: Skip side work for a chosen shift.
rewards_ui.redeem_approval_note: All redemptions need manager approval before bucks are deducted.
rewards_ui.redeem_off_msg: Your manager has paused cashing in bucks right now. Check back soon!

game_hub_cards.memory_desc: Match wine pairings, ingredients & dishes, and cocktails across multiple difficulty levels
game_hub_cards.word_search_desc: Find hidden menu items, ingredients, and specials in word search puzzles
game_hub_cards.picture_this_desc: Choose the correct ingredients, prices, and more from menu pictures

onboarding.signup_subtitle: Set up your restaurant on MyResto Connect
onboarding.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign In
onboarding.seasonal_menus: Does your restaurant have seasonal menus?
onboarding.join_code_instructions: Share this code with your staff. They'll use it to join your restaurant on MyResto Connect.

join.title: Join Your Restaurant
join.subtitle: Enter the code your manager gave you
join.invalid_code: Invalid join code. Please check with your manager.
join.self_signup_disabled: Self-registration is disabled for this restaurant. Please ask your manager to create your account.
join.temp_password_info: Your temporary password will be "{{password}}". You'll be asked to change it on first login.

change_password_screen.title: Change Your Password
change_password_screen.subtitle: Please set a new password to continue
change_password_screen.error_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

manage_categories.title: Manage Categories
manage_categories.access_denied: Only the restaurant owner can manage menu categories.
manage_categories.category_hint: Drag to reorder. Tap a category to open its subcategories. Built-in categories can be renamed, recolored, and hidden, but not deleted. Deleting a custom category moves its items to an "Uncategorized" category you can reassign here or in the Menu Editor.
manage_categories.subcategory_hint: Drag to reorder. Rename with the pencil, hide with the eye. Deleting a subcategory keeps its items in this category but removes the subcategory tag. Subcategories linked to recipes can't be deleted — hide them instead.
manage_categories.behavior_weekly_specials: Also appears on the Welcome Specials tab
manage_categories.behavior_lunch_dinner: Items are tagged here with the "Available for" toggle
manage_categories.behavior_wine: Uses the wine glass/bottle price fields
manage_categories.behavior_libations: Cocktails are pulled from the recipe editors
manage_categories.hint_tap_open: Tap a category to open its subcategories.
manage_categories.hint_builtin_edit: Rename, hide, or recolor built-in categories — they can't be deleted.
manage_categories.hint_delete_custom: Deleting a custom category moves its items to an "Uncategorized" category you can reassign here or in the Menu Editor.
manage_categories.hint_sub_delete: Deleting a subcategory doesn't delete its items — they stay in this Category and still appear on the menu, just without the subcategory grouping. Re-tag them to another subcategory anytime by editing the item.
manage_categories.hint_recipe_backed: Marking this keeps the cocktails automatically synced to the {{menu1}} and {{menu2}} Libation Recipes editors in the Bar Assistant.
manage_categories.hint_recipe_locked: Locked subcategories can't be deleted — rename or hide them instead.
manage_categories.recipe_backed_toggle: Sync cocktails from the Libation Recipes editors
manage_categories.delete_category_confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Items in it will move to Uncategorized.
manage_categories.delete_subcategory_confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Items in it will keep the category but lose this subcategory.

menu_upload.title: AI Menu Upload
menu_upload.first_free_sub: Upload a PDF or photos and we’ll build your menu. You review everything before it goes live.
menu_upload.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Premium to upload more menus
menu_upload.processing_message: AI is reading your menu… this can take 40 seconds to 3 minutes depending on the file size. Please don't close the app while it scans your file.
menu_upload.owner_only_msg: Only the restaurant owner can upload a menu.
menu_upload.premium_msg: AI Menu Upload requires the Premium plan ($15/mo). Upgrade to unlock this and other premium features.
menu_upload.permission_msg: Please allow photo access to upload menu photos.
menu_upload.failed_generic: Something went wrong reading that menu. Please try again.
menu_upload.review_load_failed: Could not load the parsed menu.
menu_upload.review_intro: Check what the AI found, edit anything, and uncheck items you don’t want. Nothing is added until you tap “Add to Menu”.
menu_upload.replace_warn: Replace deletes this menu’s current items first. Items shared with the other menu are kept.
menu_upload.replace_confirm_msg: This deletes {{menu}}’s current items first, then adds these. Items shared with the other menu are kept.
menu_upload.cocktails_sub: These aren’t added here — add cocktails in the Bartender Recipe editors so they get recipes, glassware and garnish:
menu_upload.nothing_msg: Select at least one item to add.
menu_upload.applied_msg: Added {{ins}} items.{{del}} You can fine-tune anything in the Menu Editor.
menu_upload.delete_modal_sub: This permanently deletes that menu’s items. Items shared with the other menu are kept.
menu_upload.delete_also_cats: Also delete custom categories (keeps built-in ones)
menu_upload.delete_mismatch_msg: Type the menu name exactly to confirm.
menu_upload.insufficient_msg: This needs {{cost}} credits but you have {{have}} left this month. Credits reset next month.
menu_upload.upload_hint: Reading a menu takes about 40 seconds to 3 minutes depending on the file size. Please don't close the app while it scans your menu file or image.
